prompts.name: General repository task
prompts.useThisWhen: A repository request needs inspection and scoped work.

prompts.name: Repair validation failure
prompts.useThisWhen: App output reports error failed schema validation mismatch timeout exception or blocked work.
prompts.doNotUseWhen: The output is nominal and no failure is present.
prompts.text: Diagnose error failure timeout exception schema validation mismatch and repair from xyz_failure_evidence.

prompts.name: Runtime proof
prompts.useThisWhen: Runtime output needs observed behavior proof.
prompts.text: Collect runtime output and proof without inflating evidence.

prompts.name: Bounded GNHF failure repair
prompts.useThisWhen: A failed validation or timeout needs a bounded committed GNHF repair.
prompts.doNotUseWhen: A regular AI prompt is required.
prompts.text: Launch bounded GNHF repair for error failed validation timeout in xyz_repo_or_path.
